boundaryAssertions.ownerResponsibility: Maestro, EAS, release evidence JSON, failure classification, release note, and readiness gating.
boundaryAssertions.forbiddenOwnershipTransfer: Does not relabel failed Maestro or required checks as pass and does not production submit without recorded human approval.
boundaryAssertions.externalRuntimeModificationBoundary: Keeps mobile release tooling in the new mobile app repository and does not modify external platform/runtime repositories.
boundaryAssertions.humanGateBoundary: Escalates production submit, payment, PII, external messaging, legal/terms, and accept-risk-after-gate-failure.
